summary: Validated the chapter scaffold plus 9 beats. 3 warnings: beats 1-8 run eight consecutive scene beats before the lone sequel, all scene beats land yes-but, and beats 1-5 darken steadily before the source-plan pivot. Added 4 enrichments covering Hearthglen fortifications, Uther's field-healer profile, Falric's camp role, and the Hearthglen-to-Stratholme grain-road push. Continuity and chapter-bridge annotation deferred to plan-verifier.
